news.headline: Annual holiday call-in show featuring odd lots on Bloomberg.
Matthews International responds to Barington Capital, focusing on driving long-term value creation. No specific numbers mentioned.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, Pittsburgh-based Matthews International Corporation (NASDAQ GSM: MATW) released a statement addressing a recent communication and nomination received from Barington Capital Group. The Company acknowledged the received statement and nomination notice from Barington.

news.headline: Neo Financial launches new Neo World Mastercard and Neo World Elite Mastercard with top-tier cashback rates for Canadians.
news.summary: Neo Financial Technologies Inc. has unveiled two new cashback credit cards, the Neo World Mastercard® and the Neo World Elite® Mastercard, aiming to provide Canadian consumers with enhanced rewards on their daily purchases. These cards offer competitive cashback rates to assist consumers in addressing the increasing cost of living. As individuals seek to optimize their spending, these cards stand out with their lucrative cashback incentives.

news.headline: PPG named as one of Foundry’s Computerworld’s Best Places to Work in IT in 2025, marking its 7th appearance on the list.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh today, PPG (NYSE: PPG) revealed its latest achievement - being named among the top workplaces for IT in 2025 by Foundry’s Computerworld. This marks the seventh time PPG has made it to this esteemed list. The recognition is awarded to companies that push their IT teams with opportunities and offer attractive benefits and pay packages. PPG's Vice President and Chief, Bhaskar Ramachandran, expressed pride in the acknowledgment, stating, “It’s a great honor to again be recognized for excellence in our Digital IT function.”

news.headline: Discovery Point Mooresville, a leading childcare franchise, opened its new center in Mooresville, NC. Over 50 communities served since 1988.
news.summary: In Mooresville, North Carolina, a new center by Discovery Point Child Development Centers, a renowned educational childcare franchise, has recently opened its doors. Established in 1988, Discovery Point now operates in more than 50 communities across the Southeastern region.

news.headline: Colangelo & Partners chosen as the agency for The Consorzio Alto Adige Wines, to boost US presence. Dec. 10, 2024.
news.summary: The Consorzio Alto Adige Wines has recently revealed a key collaboration with Colangelo & Partners aimed at strengthening their foothold in the United States market. This partnership, announced in New York on December 10, 2024, is significant as the Consorzio Alto Adige Wines represents the majority of the region's wine makers. Their primary goal is to boost the awareness and sales of wines from this region in the U.S. This move is part of their strategy to expand their presence and reach a broader audience in the American market.

news.headline: We're Live In 10! Join us as we walk through navigating FX Price Action and News Trading
January named "Store Brands Month" to promote retailers' own brands, highlighting quality and value.
news.summary: A consumer initiative is highlighting the quality and value of retailers' own brands. This program, known as Store Brands Month in January, aims to showcase the excellence of store brands to customers. This collaboration between retailers and manufacturers emphasizes the value and quality of these products. The initiative, set to launch in January 2025, will promote the benefits of store brands to shoppers. The program aims to boost awareness and appreciation for these products, which offer quality and value for consumers. Store Brands Month seeks to strengthen the recognition of retailers' own brands among consumers.

news.headline: Inventor from Texas develops MAXX STACK burial system for efficient land use and proper burials.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on December 10, 2024, an inventor from Desoto, Texas, shared his motivation for creating the MAXX STACK burial system. The inventor explained that the innovative design was aimed at conserving space and ensuring a dignified burial for all individuals. By optimizing land usage, the MAXX STACK system offers a more efficient approach to burial, addressing the issue of limited space in cemeteries.

news.headline: Donor Alliance awards CO Springs DMV employee for saving lives, presents 2024 DMV Appreciation Award to Rosie Gum.
news.summary: In Colorado Springs, the act of registering as an organ and tissue donor plays a crucial role in saving and healing lives, as emphasized by Donor Alliance. This organization highlights the significance of driver license offices in processing nearly all donor registrations within the state. In recognition of their pivotal role in facilitating donations, Donor Alliance awarded the 2024 DMV Appreciation Award to Rosie Gum from the Colorado Springs State Driver License Office. This recognition serves to honor the efforts of individuals such as Rosie who contribute to the organ donation process. Each year, Donor Alliance acknowledges a deserving recipient within the Driver License Office network for their dedication to this important cause.

news.headline: Fed bids for 3-year notes total $415.4 mln.
LoopMe buys Chartboost from Zynga to boost brand advertising in digital ecosystem.
news.summary: In a recent business move, LoopMe has acquired Chartboost from Zynga in a deal that is set to accelerate LoopMe's objective of enhancing brand advertising within the digital ecosystem. This acquisition marks a significant step for LoopMe as it looks to strengthen its presence in the industry. The purchase involves a substantial amount of money, reflecting the company's commitment to expanding its reach and capabilities. This strategic decision highlights LoopMe's focus on driving innovation and growth in the digital advertising sector, particularly in key markets such as London and New York.

news.headline: Chiplet Summit's pre-conference day on Jan 21 in Santa Clara focuses on chiplet basics & advanced packaging methods.
news.summary: A Chiplet Summit will take place on January 21-23 at the Santa Clara Convention Center. The focus is on updating diverse practitioners on chiplet technology. The pre-conference day on January 21 will cover tutorial topics. In the morning (8:30 am-noon), sessions will include Chiplet Basics, Advanced Packaging Methods, and Introduction to Die-to-Die Interfaces sponsored by Alphawave Semi. In the afternoon (1:00-5:00 pm), sessions will cover Design Methods and Working with Foundries.

news.headline: Gold price rises over 1%; Ollie's Bargain Outlet shares surge by 14% post Q3 earnings. NASDAQ gains 50 points to 19,786.14.
news.summary: Midway through trading, U.S. stocks were mostly higher on Tuesday, with the Nasdaq Composite increasing by approximately 50 points. The Dow was up by 0.02% at 44,412.05, the NASDAQ rose by 0.25% to 19,786.14, and the S&P 500 gained 0.07% to reach 6,057.30. Communication services shares surged by 2.5%, while real estate shares dropped by 0.9%. Ollie's Bargain Outlet Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:OLLI) saw its shares soar over 14% after releasing third-quarter results, reporting adjusted earnings per share of 58 cents (beating street estimates of 57 cents) and quarterly sales of $517.43 million (a 7.8% increase, surpassing analyst consensus of $517.36 million). For more details, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Ghana's former President receives significant backing to address high inflation rates.

JPMorgan upgrades bitcoin miners CleanSpark (CLSK) and Cipher Mining (CIFR) to overweight, citing market undervaluation. Cipher aims for 300MW expansion in Texas by 2025, seen as best-positioned miner.
news.summary: On Tuesday, JPMorgan upgraded CleanSpark Inc (NASDAQ:CLSK) and Cipher Mining Inc (NASDAQ:CIFR) from Neutral to Overweight. The analyst Reginald L. Smith made the call due to the market undervaluing both companies despite the rising Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) price. Cipher Mining is focusing on expanding its electrical infrastructure and data centers in Texas, aiming to establish a 300MW greenfield site by 2025. The company benefits from a competitive power contract costing less than $0.03 per kWh. JPMorgan sees Cipher Mining as the top miner with projected hash rate growth of over 190% by 2025. This presents a lucrative opportunity for investors amidst the ongoing crypto-mining boom.

news.headline: Dow and S&P 500 show uncertainty in midday trading. Stay updated for more info.
Huawei's leading in foldable smartphones; resilient brand with market domination in wearables, smartphones.
news.summary: Dec. 10, 2024 - In Dubai, UAE, tech brand Huawei has shown remarkable resilience and dominance in the market, particularly in wearables and smartphones. Experts acknowledge Huawei's consistent innovation and progress, leading to a significant increase in market share. The brand continues to impress with its continuous strides forward in the technology sector, solidifying its position as a leading force.

news.headline: Pomeroy Technologies buys Soroc Technology, enhancing North American presence. #acquisition #expansion.
news.summary: Pomeroy Technologies, based in New York, has recently acquired Soroc Technology, a company that specializes in technology solutions and services. This acquisition marks a strategic move for Pomeroy as they expand their offerings in the technology sector. The deal involves an undisclosed amount of money and is expected to strengthen Pomeroy's position in the market. Soroc Technology brings a wealth of expertise and experience to the table, which will complement Pomeroy's existing capabilities. This acquisition is part of Pomeroy's growth strategy and demonstrates their commitment to enhancing their technological offerings.

news.headline: Dow Jones flat as Nvidia risks support level. Google stock breaks out. Tesla boosted by analyst. AI stock falls after earnings.
news.summary: The Dow Jones experienced a decline in today's stock market, with Nvidia seeing an increase from a crucial support level. AI stock faced a drop following its earnings report. Conversely, Tesla received a boost from an analyst's upgrade. Google stock broke out after a significant leap. This information was part of the live coverage provided by Investor's Business Daily, offering insights into the stock market's performance, including the Dow Jones and various key stocks like Nvidia, AI, Tesla, and Google.

news.headline: Healthy Infrastructure unveils eSun Solar Noise Barriers for highway walls, blending sound control and clean energy generation.
news.summary: In December 10, 2024, in Hamilton, a company named Healthy Infrastructure revealed their latest innovation - the eSun Solar Noise Barriers. These specialized barriers, designed for highway noise walls, can be seamlessly integrated with any conventional post-and-panel systems. They not only effectively diminish noise pollution along highways, but also produce clean energy through solar power.

news.headline: 5G Americas report explores AI integration in 5G networks, covering all network levels for advanced wireless cellular.
news.summary: Discover how artificial intelligence (AI) is being incorporated into 5G and 5G-Advanced wireless cellular networks in Bellevue, Washington. This integration is happening across all network levels and is revolutionizing the technology. The merge of AI with 5G is set to bring forth significant advancements in the telecommunications industry, improving efficiency and performance. Stay updated on this transformative combination that will shape the future of wireless communication.

news.headline: Liangzhu Forum in Hangzhou gathered 300+ cultural figures to discuss mutual learning for human progress.
news.summary: Hangzhou, China, played host to the Second Liangzhu Forum on November 11, 2024. The event took place in Zhejiang Province's capital and saw over 300 cultural experts assembling to discuss the theme of "exchanges and mutual learning for a new model of human progress." The forum attracted a significant number of attendees, emphasizing the importance of cultural dialogue and cooperation in shaping the future.

news.headline: AWHP supports USPSTF's updated draft cervical cancer guidelines, emphasizing importance of "A" rating for co-testing. (Characters: 112)
news.summary: New draft guidelines released by the U.S. Preventive Services Task Force stress the importance of a top-rating for co-testing in cervical cancer screening to uphold patient-provider options and availability. The guidelines were announced on December 10, 2024 in Washington. Dr. Haywood Brown, Senior Associate Vice President, highlighted the significance of these guidelines for ensuring comprehensive screening approaches. The focus is on maintaining patient-provider choice and accessibility to improve outcomes.

news.headline: Optimizely ranked highest in 'Strategy' & 'Current Offering' by independent research firm. Leader in Experience Optimization Solutions.
news.summary: Optimizely, a top provider of digital experience platforms, has been recognized by an independent research firm as a Leader in the latest assessment. Ranking highest in the 'Strategy' and 'Current Offering' categories, this achievement highlights Optimizely's leading position in the industry. The accolade was announced on December 10, 2024, in New York. This recognition emphasizes the company's strong performance and innovative approach in delivering digital experiences.

(Nasdaq: COLB), revealed the appointment of David Navarro as the new Senior Vice President and Southern Nevada Commercial Banking Market Leader. A native of Las Vegas, Navarro will be taking on the responsibility of overseeing...

news.headline: DISA Global Solutions integrates with Workday, achieving Design Approved Integration status.报道包括：DISA Global Solutions与Workday集成，实现设计批准集成状态。
news.summary: Houston, December 10, 2024 - DISA Global Solutions, in partnership with Workday, Inc. (NASDAQ: WDAY), has successfully integrated their comprehensive screening and compliance solutions with the Workday platform. This achievement includes obtaining the Workday Design Approved Integration status. This collaboration signifies an important milestone for DISA, expanding their services to Workday's wide customer base.

news.headline: Inventor from Aubrey, Texas creates ARM PROTECTOR for baseball players to shield rear arm during inside pitches.
news.summary: A resident of Aubrey, Texas expressed his motivation in designing the ARM PROTECTOR to shield a baseball player's rear arm during batting. The inventor aimed to provide a safeguard against inside pitches, ensuring the player's safety. The ARM PROTECTOR serves as a protective barrier and has been created to offer enhanced security during matches. The design innovatively caters to the needs of baseball players, particularly shielding their arms during crucial moments in the game. This creation by the inventor includes specific features to mitigate potential risks and injuries during gameplay. The product has garnered attention for its novel approach to keeping players safe and is poised to make a notable impact in the baseball community.

news.headline: EIA lowers forecast for Brent Crude prices to $80.49 per barrel in 2024, down from the previous forecast of $80.95 per barrel last month.
JPMorgan's Lake: The US economy overall continues to be pretty resilient.
EIA lowers forecast for US WTI prices to $76.51 per barrel in 2024, down from the previous forecast of $77.00 per barrel last month.
Predictive Index wins 2 gold awards at Brandon Hall Group Excellence in Technology Awards & celebrates 100th podcast episode.
news.summary: A company based in Westwood, Massachusetts, known as The Predictive Index (PI), has recently celebrated a successful year by clinching two prestigious Gold awards at the Brandon Hall Group Excellence in Technology Awards. Additionally, they marked a significant milestone by reaching their 100th episode of their podcast.

news.headline: France’s President Macron is in favour of reaching an agreement under which political parties would not censure the government - Macron's Aides.
France’s President Macron plans to name new prime minister within 48 hours - French Official.
Mars, Inc. recognized by Fast Company for second year in a row, celebrating cultural impact. #BrandsThatMatter
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, Mars, Incorporated, a leading global company known for producing popular snacks, food, and pet products, was honored for achieving cultural significance and strong connections. The company's recognition in Fast Company's fourth annual awards highlights its impact in the industry. Based in McLean, Virginia, Mars is celebrated for its contributions to the market, showcasing its commitment to excellence.

news.headline: AUGA group, AB to move shares from Main List to Secondary List on AB Nasdaq Vilnius. Transfer requested on Nov 26, 2024.
news.summary: On November 26, 2024, the AUGA group, AB presented a request to AB Nasdaq Vilnius for moving the Company's shares (AUG1L, ISIN code LT0000127466) from the Official Trading List to the Secondary List as per the Board's decision.

news.headline: Inventor from Odessa, Texas creates TRACK RACKS device for rounded loads on trailers. Dec. 10, 2024.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on December 10, 2024, an inventor from Odessa, Texas, shared his inspiration for creating TRACK RACKS - a new solution for transporting rounded loads on flatbed and gooseneck trailers. The inventor, a truck driver, believed there was room for improvement in this area and devised a design to address the challenge. This innovative product eliminates the necessity of using certain methods for supporting these types of loads, potentially revolutionizing the industry.

news.headline: Microsoft shareholders reject proposal to allocate funds to Bitcoin due to its high volatility, according to the board.
news.summary: The board of directors of the company rejected the resolution, stating concerns about the alleged volatility of Bitcoin as a disadvantage.

news.headline: Food Safety Testing market report analyzes trends & forecasts in US$ for 2021, 2024, and 2030 globally.
news.summary: Dublin - A report on the global Food Safety Testing market has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. This comprehensive analysis delves into the market segmented by application, test type, and geographic region. Historical and present trends, as well as future forecasts for 2021, 2024, and 2030, are examined in terms of value in US dollars. Food Safety Testing, a scientific technique for evaluating food safety based on microbiological factors, is the focus of the report.

news.headline: Seldens opens new Bassett® Furniture showroom in Bellevue, Washington, expanding presence and joining three existing locations.
news.summary: Seldens, a long-standing family-owned home furnishings and design consultancy operating in the Pacific Northwest for more than 80 years, revealed its recent growth by inaugurating a new Bassett® showroom in Bellevue, Washington. This new addition cements Seldens' footprint in the region, following the prosperous launch of the Tacoma Bassett showroom. It now complements the existing three Seldens outlets in Bellevue, Olympia, and Tacoma, along with two Summer House outdoor furniture showrooms. This move signifies the company's commitment to expanding its presence and offerings in the market.

news.headline: Solana's struggles contrast with ETH, XRP. SOL: $208.69, $99.4B cap, -7.3%. ETH: $3,586.94, $432B, -6.4%. XRP: $2.04, $117.7B, -14.1%. Trader predictions favor SOL reaching $500 and $600.
news.summary: Despite Solana's recent lackluster performance, traders remain optimistic about the altcoin's future. Solana (SOL) is currently priced at $208.69 with a market cap of $99.4 billion, experiencing a 7.3% decrease in the last 24 hours and a 6.6% decrease over the past seven days. In comparison, Ethereum (ETH) is valued at $3,586.94 with a market cap of $432 billion, showing a 6.4% decrease in the last 24 hours but a 0.5% increase in the past week. XRP is priced at $2.04 with a market cap of $117.7 billion, reflecting a 14.1% decrease in the last 24 hours and a 19.7% decrease over the past seven days. Crypto trader McKenna predicts that Solana could reach $500 soon, highlighting its resilience and potential. Another trader, Jelle, forecasts a rally to $600 in the upcoming months.

news.headline: Spend Analytics Market expected to reach $290.12B by 2030, growing at 17.98% CAGR, driven by demand for cost management and advanced analytics tools.
news.summary: The growth of the Spend Analytics Market is fueled by the rising demand from organizations to efficiently handle and enhance procurement and operational expenses. This trend is further supported by the increasing utilization of advanced analytics and AI tools for making data-driven decisions. Additionally, the surge in e-procurement solutions has also contributed to this market upswing. As per recent data, the global Spend Analytics Market is projected to reach a value of approximately $5.7 billion in the coming years, showcasing a significant increase from previous years.

Rev Group's performance surged 64% this year, with fourth-quarter earnings reported. Poised for breakout.
news.summary: Rev Group announced its fourth-quarter earnings on Wednesday. The company, a top performer in the Covid era, has seen a surge of 64% in its stock this year. It is now expected to continue this growth trend and break out even further in the near future.

news.headline: South Africa cosmetics industry report 2024, 47 company profiles; includes major international and local manufacturers, trade, green products.
news.summary: A new report on the cosmetics industry in South Africa has recently been released and is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. This report provides insights into the South African cosmetics industry, covering aspects such as major international and local manufacturers and brands, trade dynamics, key growth drivers, sustainability concerns like green products and animal testing, as well as factors influencing the market such as health trends, input costs, and innovation. The report features profiles of 47 companies, including prominent international brands.

news.headline: Velcan Holdings reported buying back 1,000 shares weekly for the program.
Boise Cascade buys Florida door shop from Parksite in expansion deal. Includes 22 locations, now under Boise ownership.
news.summary: Boise Cascade Company (NYSE: BCC) has acquired the assets of Parksite's Lakeland, Florida door shop. Parksite, with a total of 22 locations, has agreed to sell only its Florida door shop in this deal. The remaining Parksite locations and products will remain under Parksite's ownership. The transaction was finalized today, expanding Boise Cascade's presence in the Florida market. The Parksite Florida door shop boasts a diverse range of products for customers.

news.headline: Zendesk appoints Shashi Upadhyay as President of Product, Engineering, and AI to enhance customer experience.
news.summary: In a bid to enhance customer experience, AI innovator Zendesk has appointed Shashi Upadhyay as the new President of Product, Engineering, and AI on December 10, 2024, in San Francisco. Upadhyay will lead efforts to develop top-notch products.
